test_command: No unit tests currently; build verification is the primary check
verification_instructions: Run npx next build and confirm it succeeds without errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access to Mailchimp APIs. No Mailchimp SDK - use raw fetch(). The free plan does NOT support automations endpoint.
contribution_requirements: Use raw fetch() for API calls (no SDKs). Follow existing pattern from app/api/email-results/route.ts. Use @/ path aliases.
key_patterns: API routes use Next.js app router (app/api/*/route.ts). Lib modules export functions used by both client and server. Environment variables accessed via process.env. Fire-and-forget pattern for webhooks.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages and API routes; lib/ - shared utilities and API clients; components/ - React components; public/ - static assets
